query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS orphan_exceptions FROM dq_exception_detail e LEFT JOIN dq_result_fact r ON e.dq_result_id = r.dq_result_id WHERE r.dq_result_id IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS impossible_counts FROM dq_result_fact WHERE failed_count > total_checked
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_mismatch FROM dq_result_fact WHERE failed_count + passed_count != total_checked
SELECT COUNT(*) AS inconsistent_pass_flag FROM dq_result_fact WHERE (pass_flag = TRUE AND failed_count > 0) OR (pass_flag = FALSE AND failed_count = 0)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dq_rule_id) AS rules_run_batch_2022 FROM dq_result_fact WHERE load_batch_id = 'BATCH_2022_01'
